parameters.formDescription: Paste your CV text to find matching jobs and receive a tailored CV for each opportunity.

values.placeholder: Paste the full text content of your CV here...

parameters.text:
=You are an expert HR analyst and career advisor.

Analyse the following CV and extract a structured profile:

<cv>
{{ $json["CV Text"] }}
</cv>

Return ONLY a JSON object (no markdown) with:
{
  "name": "candidate full name or 'Unknown'",
  "summary": "2-3 sentence professional summary",
  "primary_job_title": "most suitable job title based on experience",
  "skills": ["skill1", "skill2", ...],
  "years_experience": <number>,
  "education_level": "highest degree",
  "languages": ["language1", ...],
  "search_keywords": "3-5 keywords ideal for job search based on this profile"
}

=You are an expert CV writer and career coach.

You must create a tailored, professional CV for the candidate below, specifically optimised for the following job offer.

## JOB OFFER
Title: {{ $json.job_title }}
Company: {{ $json.company }}
Location: {{ $json.location }}
Description: {{ $json.description }}

## CANDIDATE ORIGINAL CV
{{ $json.cv_text }}

## INSTRUCTIONS
1. Rewrite the professional summary to match the job requirements.
2. Reorder and emphasise skills that are most relevant to this job.
3. Rephrase work experience bullet points using keywords from the job description.
4. Keep all factual information (dates, titles, companies, degrees) accurate — do NOT invent anything.
5. Keep the CV concise (max 2 pages equivalent in text).
6. Format as clean plain text, sections separated by blank lines.

Return ONLY the tailored CV text, starting with the candidate's name.

meta.description: Analyzes a CV with AI, searches matching jobs via Adzuna, and generates a tailored CV for each job offer.
